name: Only X Left Sticker
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can display \"Only X Left\" inventory stickers on product cards to create urgency and encourage faster purchasing decisions when stock levels are low. This scarcity indicator helps customers understand product availability at a glance, which can motivate quicker action and help improve conversion rates for limited-inventory items."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Showing real-time inventory levels through stickers leverages scarcity as a conversion driver, helping reduce hesitation when customers are considering a purchase. This transparency about stock availability not only creates urgency but also sets appropriate expectations, potentially reducing cart abandonment by signaling when products are in limited supply."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The \u2018Only X Left!\u2019 sticker is a valuable tool to create a sense of urgency and scarcity, encouraging customers to make a purchase decision quickly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This documentation outlines the steps to set up the \"Only X Left!\" sticker on product cards within your Merchandising Cloud-powered Shopify store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"bold": true, "text": "Integration Steps"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Activate Toggle in Merchant Dashboard", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to the Merchant Dashboard."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "As shown in the screenshot below, within the \u2018Quantity\u2019 field, activate the toggle for the \"Only X Left!\" sticker feature"}, {"text": ".", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KHM0WKDZZ5U2/d8024da646e64d3bb6a0dea90b4798260ef7ff57cef383f40009a051f29a1638-image-20.jpeg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KHM0WKDZZ5U2/d8024da646e64d3bb6a0dea90b4798260ef7ff57cef383f40009a051f29a1638-image-20.jpeg", "name": "d8024da646e64d3bb6a0dea90b4798260ef7ff57cef383f40009a051f29a1638-image_20.jpeg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 33556, "width": 1600, "height": 806, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FKHM0WKDZZ5U2%2Fd8024da646e64d3bb6a0dea90b4798260ef7ff57cef383f40009a051f29a1638-image-20.jpeg", "mediaID": 1069, "dateInserted": "2025-10-21T17:52:50+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Create\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "findify-product-stickers.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0in Snippets", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In your Shopify admin panel, go to Online Store \u2192 Themes \u2192 Actions \u2192 Edit Code"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Create a new snippet named\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-stickers.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Copy and paste the provided Liquid code into the newly created snippet."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{%- liquid assign quantity = quantity | plus: 0-%}
{% if quantity > 0 -%} Only {{ quantity }} left! {% else -%} out of stock {%- endif %}
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Add Styles to\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "findify-product-card.css", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.css", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file in your Shopify theme editor."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Paste the following CSS styles to define the appearance of the \"Only X Left!\" sticker."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ".findify-quantity-sticker { color: #515151; font-family: Inter; font-size: 8px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 700; line-height: 2; text-transform: uppercase;}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Step 4: Integrate Code into\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Locate the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file in your Shopify theme editor."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Insert the following code snippet within the product card section to display the \"Only X Left!\" sticker."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% render 'findify-product-stickers', quantity: quantity %}"}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Conclusion", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By following these straightforward steps, you can effectively set up the \"Only X Left!\" sticker on product cards within your Shopify store. Create a sense of urgency and drive conversions by showcasing product availability in a clear and compelling manner."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
